abilities.description: You harden your heart: Reduce your heart stat by 1 and add up to +2 to shadow (to a maximum of +4).
You are attuned to the realms of shadow: When you perform a ritual, add +1.

You know the sly ways of death: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death}, you may roll +shadow (instead of +heart). On a weak hit, if you choose to undertake a death-bound quest, you may roll +shadow (instead of +heart) and reroll any dice as you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow}. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} on that quest fill 1 box on your quests legacy track.
